This compact catalog follows OpenClaw and Hermes progressive-disclosure boundaries: core GitClaw tools stay directly visible, repo-reviewed toolsets and MCP allowlists are cataloged as metadata, and full schemas or instructions would be loaded only through a future reviewed bridge. Raw tool schemas, toolset instructions, MCP command args, tool inputs, tool outputs, issue bodies, comments, prompts, credentials, and secret values are not included.
